1.content: Drilldown of Grafana **Total Network Throughput**. Envelope: rx positive, tx negated.

2.title: Host Network Throughput (In positive)
2.query:
timeseries {rx=avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_rx), tx=avg(dt.host.net.nic.bytes_tx)}, by:{dt.entity.host}
| fieldsAdd host=entityName(dt.entity.host)
| filter in(host, "Lab1", "Lab2", "Lab3")
| fieldsRemove dt.entity.host
| fieldsAdd tx = tx[] * -1
